title: equisetum reptans var. variegatum
intro: Equisetum reptans var. variegatum, also known as variegated horsetail or variegated marsh horsetail, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high silica content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum reptans var. variegatum include its potential to improve joint health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to improve skin and hair health due to its high silica content. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
